basic_details.job_title: MANIT Bhopal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology (MANIT Bhopal)
basic_details.short_information: Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology (MANIT Bhopal) Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 has been released on 30 June 2026 on the official website of MANIT Bhopal. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the MANIT Bhopal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 33 years. Age Relaxation: As per GOI rules for SC/ST/OBC/Women/PH candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: M.E./M.Tech/M.Sc in Mechanical/Automobile/Production/Material Science/Manufacturing/Mechatronics/Electronics/Physics/Agriculture/Mathematics or relevant specialization, B.Tech/B.E. or Integrated Professional Degree with min CGPA 7.5 and valid GATE qualification
qualification.details: M.E./M.Tech/M.Sc in Mechanical/Automobile/Production/Material Science/Manufacturing/Mechatronics/Electronics/Physics/Agriculture/Mathematics or relevant specialization (Design, Thermal, Tribology, Materials, Mechatronics, Embedded Systems, Electronics, Thermal, etc.) OR B.Tech./B.E. or Integrated Professional Degree with a minimum CGPA of 7.5 and a valid GATE qualification.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MANIT Bhopal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the MANIT Bhopal Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for MANIT Bhopal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: MANIT Bhopal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MANIT Bhopal JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 20th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.E./M.Tech/M.Sc degree or an equivalent professional degree with a minimum CGPA of 7.5 and a valid GATE qualification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position is 33 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37,000/- plus House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete application along with required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC/SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF position at MANIT Bhopal?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview, which may be conducted online or offline.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: You need to attach self-attested copies of all relevant documents, including educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q9. Where is MANIT Bhopal located?
faq.answer: MANIT Bhopal is located in Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, with the pincode 462003.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow position is a contractual role as per the official notification.
